classification_levels.description: Information whose compromise would cause catastrophic damage to the Gatekeeper's life, finances, or family safety.
classification_levels.access_rule: Gatekeeper only. No agent may store, transmit, or reference TS data without explicit per-instance Gatekeeper authorisation.
classification_levels.logging: Access attempts logged even if denied. Successful access logged with full context.

classification_levels.description: Information whose compromise would cause serious damage to operations, competitive position, or personal interests.
classification_levels.access_rule: Domain-specific agents with charter scope only. Cross-domain access requires Boardroom vote.
classification_levels.logging: Every access logged with agent ID, timestamp, and purpose.

classification_levels.description: Internal operational information that should not be shared outside the system or across domains without authorisation.
classification_levels.access_rule: Agents within the relevant domain + cross-cutting governance agents. Board agents have summary access only.
classification_levels.logging: Access logged with agent ID and timestamp.

classification_levels.description: General operational information available to all authorised agents.
classification_levels.access_rule: All agents with active charter. No external sharing without Gatekeeper approval.

general_principles: NEED-TO-KNOW: No agent receives information beyond what their charter requires to function.
MINIMUM NECESSARY: When sharing is authorised, share the minimum data needed for the task.
NO LATERAL SHARING: Agents at the same level do not share data with each other unless explicitly authorised by their shared supervisor or the Boardroom.
UPWARD TRANSPARENCY: Agents must share all relevant information upward to their reporting line. Withholding material information from a supervisor is a constitutional violation (G5).
DOWNWARD RESTRICTION: Supervisors share only task-relevant information with subordinates. Strategic context is shared on a need-to-know basis.

CROSS-DOMAIN FIREWALL: No information flows between domains without explicit authorisation from the Boardroom or Gatekeeper. Exception: Executive Function Agent receives energy/scheduling summaries from all domains.

mandatory_sharing.description: Information that MUST be shared regardless of other rules.

items.to: Health Monitor + Executive Function Agent + Gatekeeper
Cyber Security Agent + Audit Agent + Gatekeeper

prohibited_sharing.description: Information that must NEVER be shared between these parties.

items.to_not: Business agents, Creative agents, External parties
All agents except Gatekeeper and Executive Function Agent (schedule only)
All non-creative agents except Audit Agent (for IP clearance)
All agents except Gatekeeper and Reflection Agent (aggregate only)
Subject of investigation until investigation is complete

cross_domain_access_matrix.description: What each agent role can access across domains. FULL = all data, SUMMARY = aggregate/status only, SCHEDULE = timing/calendar only, NONE = no access.
